description: Historical and continuously rolled-up Codex usage from the private ledger. API-equivalent cost uses verified standard list prices and is not an invoice or subscription charge.

panels.description: Selected-period Codex tokens. Input already includes cache input; cache and reasoning are breakdowns and are not added again.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Total tokens" FROM grafana.codex_usage_api_equivalent WHERE source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time);

panels.title: Total tokens

panels.description: Current standard API list-price equivalent for matched models. This is not the Codex subscription charge or an invoice.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(estimated_api_cost_usd), 0)::double precision AS "API-equivalent USD" FROM grafana.codex_usage_api_equivalent WHERE source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time);

panels.title: API-equivalent cost

panels.description: Token-weighted share covered by a verified model price. Historical rows without a model remain visibly unpriced.

targets.rawSql: SELECT (FLOOR(100000.0 * COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens) FILTER (WHERE pricing_matched), 0) / NULLIF(SUM(total_tokens), 0)) / 1000.0)::double precision AS "Pricing coverage" FROM grafana.codex_usage_api_equivalent WHERE source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time);

panels.title: Pricing coverage

panels.description: Live rollup distinguishes CLI and desktop from observed service.name. Historical backfill rows predate this column and remain unknown.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(client, 'historical / unknown') AS "Metric", SUM(total_tokens)::double precision AS "Value" FROM grafana.codex_usage_api_equivalent WHERE source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY COALESCE(client, 'historical / unknown') ORDER BY "Value" DESC;

panels.title: Tokens by client

panels.description: Consumed token volume by canonical priced model, retaining unknown and unpriced model identifiers.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, COALESCE(priced_model_id, NULLIF(model_id, ''), 'unknown model') AS metric, SUM(total_tokens)::double precision AS value FROM grafana.codex_usage_api_equivalent WHERE source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY COALESCE(priced_model_id, NULLIF(model_id, ''), 'unknown model') ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.title: Token share by model

panels.description: Content-free token totals by model. Input includes cache input; reasoning is a subset of output and total.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(priced_model_id, NULLIF(model_id, ''), 'unknown model') AS "Model", SUM(input_tokens)::bigint AS "Input tokens", SUM(cached_input_tokens)::bigint AS "Cache-read tokens", SUM(cache_write_tokens)::bigint AS "Cache-write tokens", SUM(output_tokens)::bigint AS "Output tokens", SUM(reasoning_tokens)::bigint AS "Reasoning tokens", SUM(total_tokens)::bigint AS "Total tokens" FROM grafana.codex_usage_api_equivalent WHERE source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY COALESCE(priced_model_id, NULLIF(model_id, ''), 'unknown model') ORDER BY "Total tokens" DESC;

panels.title: Token breakdown by model

panels.description: Stacked Codex token consumption by model in Grafana-selected intervals.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(event_time, $__interval), COALESCE(priced_model_id, NULLIF(model_id, ''), 'unknown model') AS metric, SUM(total_tokens)::double precision AS value FROM grafana.codex_usage_api_equivalent WHERE source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;

panels.title: Token consumption over time by model

panels.description: Cache-read share of input token volume by model; not a request hit rate.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(priced_model_id, NULLIF(model_id, ''), 'unknown model') AS "Metric", (100.0 * SUM(cached_input_tokens) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens), 0))::double precision AS "Value" FROM grafana.codex_usage_api_equivalent WHERE source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY COALESCE(priced_model_id, NULLIF(model_id, ''), 'unknown model') HAVING SUM(input_tokens) > 0 ORDER BY "Value" DESC;

panels.title: Cache-read share by model

panels.description: Models without a verified official API price remain explicit instead of silently becoming zero cost.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(model_id, ''), '(model missing)') AS "Unpriced model", SUM(total_tokens)::bigint AS "Unpriced tokens", unpriced_reason AS "Reason" FROM grafana.codex_usage_api_equivalent WHERE NOT pricing_matched AND source_instance ~ '^(${instance:regex})$' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model_id, ''), '(model missing)'), unpriced_reason ORDER BY "Unpriced tokens" DESC;

panels.title: Unpriced models

title: Codex usage & API-equivalent cost
